scripts.build: node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/contracts build && node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/api build && node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/web build
scripts.test: node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/api test && node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/web test
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/contracts typecheck && node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/api typecheck && node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/web typecheck
scripts.heroku-postbuild: node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/contracts build && node scripts/run-pnpm.mjs --filter @image-lab/api build
